step.name: collect-inputs
step.input: Dockerfile path + base-image policy + registry policy
step.action: Read the diff; locate every changed Dockerfile.

step.name: run-redflag-scan
step.action: Apply the 12 red-flag patterns; record line + severity + remediation per match.

step.name: compute-verdict
step.action: If any high-severity finding present → `fail`. If only medium/low → still `fail` (default-deny). If no findings → `pass`. If skip condition met → `skipped`.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Write JSON report to PR comment + CI artifact. Block merge if verdict=fail.
